findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "epss_timeseries" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Get the historical EPSS time series for a specific CVE. ## What this tool does Returns the historical EPSS score, percentile, and model version available for a …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
